tracks.rawText: 1:24Studio Selectionv5.5Brazilian Funk Carioca at 130 BPM in G minor, The track features a heavy, distorted sub-bass that follows a syncopated rhythmic pattern characteristic of the genre, A sharp, metallic snare hits on the off-beats, layered with a dry, punchy kick drum, High-pitched, staccato synth stabs repeat a two-note motif throughout the arrangement, The male vocals are delivered in a rhythmic, aggressive chant style with heavy use of vocal chops and stutter effects, A recurring vocal sample is processed with a high-pass filter and rapid gating, The production utilizes frequent silence and sudden drops to emphasize the rhythmic transitions2PublishRemix
tracks.title: Studio Selection
